response.justification: Bogdan Szabo’s background is heavily weighted toward software development and embedded systems, with limited evidence of expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis. His experience in performance optimization is primarily in web and mobile contexts, not in AI/ML hardware or cloud infrastructure. While he demonstrates strong software engineering skills, the core technical requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role are not sufficiently met.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance optimization for web/mobile applications
Experience with hardware-adjacent development (robotic arms, embedded systems) using languages like D and C++
Proven track record of delivering high-performance, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Limited exposure to deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD architectures
Education and background do not align with the hardware/performance architecture focus required for the role
